proposed_tasks.instructions: Extract the PDF attachment 'MISS ANFAL ELBUSHRA Student Licence.pdf' from source NAP-SRC-0029 using a PDF extraction tool. The attachment is referenced in the email but not yet extracted. Use pdftotext or similar to extract text and store as a new source material.
proposed_tasks.title: Extract text from Student Licence PDF attachment

summary: NAP-SRC-0029 email confirms a 3 MB PDF attachment named 'MISS ANFAL ELBUSHRA Student Licence.pdf' but the attachment content was not extracted. A follow-up extraction task is proposed to retrieve the PDF text.

uncertainties.text: The attachment content is missing; only the email body was extracted.
